summary: Bug fix verified: Notification count consistency between /api/notifications/sidebar-badges and /api/event-notifications/unread-count. The fix changed max() to sum for combining event_notifications_count + old_notifications_count. All 11 tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Key tests: 1) sidebar-badges.event_notifications == unread-count.count (consistency check), 2) Both endpoints sum from event_notifications AND notifications collections, 3) Mark all as read clears both systems and returns 0 for both endpoints, 4) Notification list count matches unread-count endpoint. All validation passed.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: /api/notifications/sidebar-badges used max(event_notifications_count, old_notifications_count) instead of sum. Fix: Changed to event_notifications_count + old_notifications_count to match /api/event-notifications/unread-count logic.
